javadoc_before:
/**
 * Abstract base class for TokenFilters that may remove tokens.
 * You have to implement {@link #accept} and return a boolean if the current
 * token should be preserved. {@link #incrementToken} uses this method
 * to decide if a token should be passed to the caller.
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Abstract base class for TokenFilters that may remove tokens. * You have to implement {@link #accept} and return a boolean if the current * token should be preserved. {@link #incrementToken} uses this method * to decide if a token should be passed to the caller. *

As of Lucene 4.4, an {@link IllegalArgumentException} * is thrown when trying to disable position increments when filtering terms. */
